title: Resolution Authorizing the Local Chief Executive Honorable Mayor Antonio L. Kalaw to Enter Into and Sign a Memorandum of Agreement on Behalf of the Municipal Government of Los Baños (MGLB) with the Association of Municipal Employees of Los Baños Laguna (AMELBA-UNA), Inc., Represented by Its President Joyce Ann Mae L. Del Valle in Their Interest to Join and Represent the Municipality to the E-waste Collection Drive Contest of Laguna Water District Aquatech Resources Corporation (LARC) and Ratify
